Find Your District & Constituency for SIR 2002 Search

For SIR 2026 enumeration — type your village/habitation name to find its District, Assembly Constituency & Part No., so you can look up your name on the official 2002 voter roll (voters.eci.gov.in / CEO portal).
Disclaimer — please read before use

This is an independent, unofficial, community-built tool. It is created voluntarily to assist Booth Level Officers (BLOs) and field volunteers during the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) 2026 enumeration process by helping locate the District, Assembly Constituency, and Part Number associated with a village or habitation name.

This tool is not created, endorsed, verified, or affiliated with the Election Commission of India (ECI), the Chief Electoral Officers of Andhra Pradesh or Telangana, or any Government authority, in any way.

Data displayed here was extracted from publicly accessible electoral roll portals at a point in time. It is provided "as is" without any warranty of accuracy, completeness, or currentness. Village/part boundaries, names, and constituency mappings may change, and this tool may contain errors, omissions, or outdated entries. Telangana coverage is currently partial — see note below.

Users must independently verify all information on the official ECI / state CEO portals (voters.eci.gov.in, ceoaperolls.ap.gov.in, ceotelangana.nic.in) before relying on it for any official, administrative, legal, or electoral purpose. This tool must not be treated as a substitute for official electoral records under any circumstance.

To the fullest extent permitted by law, the creator(s) and contributor(s) of this tool disclaim all liability for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential loss, damage, error, omission, delay, or inconvenience arising out of or in connection with the use, misuse, or inability to use this tool, or reliance placed on any information presented herein. Use of this tool is entirely at your own risk and discretion.

This is a free, non-commercial tool offered in good faith to support the SIR enumeration effort. No data entered by you (search queries) is collected, stored, or transmitted anywhere — all lookups happen locally in your browser.

Coverage note: Andhra Pradesh data covers all 13 undivided districts and 175 constituencies in full. Telangana data currently covers 10 undivided districts and ~107 of 119 constituencies — a handful of Hyderabad/Rangareddy-area seats are still being added. If your village/AC isn't found under Telangana, please cross-check directly on ceotelangana.nic.in for now.
Step 1 — Select District Step 2 — Type Village / Part Name
Type at least 2 letters. e.g. "Koduru"
💡 No results? This is 2002-era data — old spellings often differ from today's. Try swapping "n" ↔ "m" before a consonant (e.g. Konduru → Komduru, Kondapalli → Komdapalli, Chandragudem → Chamdragudem). Also try shorter fragments, dropping silent letters, or common variants like v↔w, b↔v.
Search across all districts
Use this if you don't know the district yet. Type at least 3 letters.
💡 No results? This is 2002-era data — old spellings often differ from today's. Try swapping "n" ↔ "m" before a consonant (e.g. Konduru → Komduru, Kondapalli → Komdapalli, Chandragudem → Chamdragudem). Also try shorter fragments, dropping silent letters, or common variants like v↔w, b↔v.
Unofficial, independent, non-commercial community tool · Built to support SIR 2026 BLOs & volunteers
Data sourced from public CEO AP & CEO Telangana portals · Not affiliated with ECI or any Government
Always cross-check on the official portal before final submission
